[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100101101 5
1 1101001101 6
2 1000111101 6
3 0000000000 a
4 0100110100 4
5 1011110011 7

7 0100100001 3
